top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_after_1930
FROM Patient
WHERE Birthday > '1930-12-31';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS female_percentage
FROM Patient
WHERE Birthday > '1930-12-31';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_after_1930
FROM Patient
WHERE Birthday > '1930-12-31';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS female_percentage
FROM Patient
WHERE Birthday > '1930-12-31';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_after_1930
FROM Patient
WHERE Birthday > '1930-12-31';
